channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Northlands City Hosts Mud for Fun 4x4 Challenge During Easter Weekend
item.description: Northlands City, a vast development in Ruiru, Kiambu County, turned into a mud-filled playground for motorsport enthusiasts and families during the Easter weekend. The Mud for Fun 4x4 Challenge, a pop...

item.title: Delhi University Undergraduate Admissions for 2026 Expected to Commence in May
item.description: Delhi University is expected to begin its undergraduate admissions for the academic year 2026 in the third week of May. The admission process will cover multiple streams including Arts, Science, and C...

item.title: U.S. Supreme Court Decision Suggests Steve Bannon’s Contempt of Congress Case May Be Dismissed
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court has issued an order favouring Steve Bannon, a close ally of former President Donald Trump, that is expected to result in the dismissal of his conviction for contempt of Congress...

item.title: Many Latino Voters in Los Angeles Remain Undecided as Mayoral Primary Approaches
item.description: A recent poll conducted by UCLA’s Luskin School of Public Affairs reveals that a significant portion of Los Angeles' Latino population remains undecided about their choice for mayor in the upcoming pr...

item.title: Ruto Orders Crackdown on Oil Cartels Amid Deepening Fuel Scandal Investigations
item.description: President William Ruto has declared a tough stance against oil cartels involved in an alleged artificial fuel shortage that has disrupted Kenya’s energy sector. Addressing the issue in Nairobi, Ruto s...

item.title: Trump escalates threats against Iran following US jet incident
item.description: President Donald Trump has intensified threats against Iran, warning of attacks on the country’s power plants and threatening widespread destruction if Iran does not comply with US demands. This comes...

item.title: South African content creators urge government backing under new tax rules
item.description: South African content creators and podcasters are calling for stronger government support as new tax regulations take hold, adding them to the South African Revenue Service’s segmentation model for ta...

item.title: Edo Governor Okpebholo support POWA traders with N200m after Ekpoma fire disaster
item.description: Edo State Governor, Monday Okpebholo, don give N200 million to members of the Police Officers’ Wives Association (POWA) wey their shops burn for fire during protest against kidnapping and crime for Ek...

item.title: A Call for Change in US Leadership to End the War with Iran
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran has reached a critical point, with the war severely impacting both the global economy and the Middle East. The author argues that the current U....

item.title: Bernado Silva to end nine-year spell at Manchester City this season
item.description: Bernado Silva, the 31-year-old Portugal midfielder, don announce say e go leave Manchester City by the end of this season. This one na big moment as e don spend nine years for the Etihad Stadium, win ...

item.title: Wike's 2016 Threats Reemerge Amid Latest Comments on TV Anchor Okinbaloye
item.description: In a resurfaced recording, Rivers State Governor Nyesom Wike is heard threatening to kill an INEC official in 2016, following an accusation of election rigging. The audio was first revealed in a 2016 ...

item.title: Princess of Wales wears elegant Self-Portrait dress for Easter Sunday service at Windsor
item.description: Catherine, Princess of Wales, showcased her timeless and polished fashion sense at the Easter Sunday church service in Windsor, wearing a sophisticated Self-Portrait blazer dress. The ensemble, which ...

item.title: Supreme Court condemns attack on Malda judicial officers, orders Bengal chief secretary to apologise
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has strongly criticised the West Bengal administration for its handling of a violent incident in Malda district where judicial officers were surrounded and held hostage by a...

item.title: Lawyers Demand Action Against Private Companies in Kenya Fuel Scam
item.description: Kenyan lawyers Ahmednassir Abdullahi and Donald Kipkorir are calling for the government to pursue all parties involved in the ongoing fuel cartel scandal, arguing that accountability should not be lim...

item.title: Chef Kenny Atkinson Shares Tips on Supermarket Meat, Affordable Ingredients, and Cooking Essentials
item.description: In a recent interview for Sky News' Cheap Eats series, Michelin-starred chef Kenny Atkinson discussed affordable yet high-quality cooking ingredients, supermarket tips, and essential kitchen tools. At...

item.title: Supreme Court Order May Lead to Dismissal of Steve Bannon's Congressional Contempt Conviction
item.description: Steve Bannon, a longtime ally of former President Donald Trump, has secured a Supreme Court order that could result in the dismissal of his 2022 conviction for contempt of Congress. The case stemmed f...

item.title: Israel strikes major Iranian petrochemical facilities, significantly reducing exports
item.description: Israel’s Defence Forces have targeted two of Iran’s largest petrochemical facilities, including the one in Asaluyeh, which alone accounts for about half of the country’s petrochemical output. The comb...

item.title: Tanzania trains top students for global mathematics competitions
item.description: Tanzania has taken a major step in strengthening its science and mathematics education after selecting 34 top-performing students from over 5,000 participants for advanced training and international r...

item.title: Iran Rejects Temporary Ceasefire as Israel Strikes Major Petrochemical Plant
item.description: Tensions between Israel and Iran continue to escalate, with Israel recently launching an attack on a key petrochemical plant at the South Pars gas field, which is a significant part of Iran's energy p...

item.title: Ebuka Criticizes Tinubu's Campaign Billboard Over Nigeria's Security Crisis
item.description: Nigerian gospel singer Ebuka has voiced his displeasure with President Bola Tinubu's latest campaign billboard ahead of the 2027 elections. The billboard, featuring the slogan 'Expect More 2027,' spar...
